title: Key concepts: the Byzantine Empire
description: Check your knowledge of the Byzantine Empire.

assessment_items.question_content:
The state religion of the Byzantine empire was

 [[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The Byzantine Empire was in the *east* and practiced an eastern denomination of Christianity.

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of the following best describes the Byzantine state? 

 [[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The Byzantine state had a religious component

choices.content: Christian empire with multiple administrative provinces

assessment_items.question_content:
Justinian I contributed to the development of the Byzantine state in which of the following ways?

 [[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Justinian's major contribution did not have to do with reorganizing government administrative divisions.

assessment_items.question_content:
The **theme system** is best described as

 [[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The theme system was a system of government administration.

choices.content: A highly patterned style of Byzantine architecture
A new military system in which land was granted to farmers who, in return, would provide the empire with loyal soldiers.
Groups of provinces that were divided into dioceses which were administered by a vicar.

hints: Iconoclasm had to do with Christian icons.

choices.content: The destruction or prohibition of religious icons and other images or monuments for religious or political motives
